title: Map Command, Page State, Navigation Invariants, and Transactional Updates · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Map Transition
summary: The map command prints names but loses the page identity, advances before a request succeeds, permits negative offsets, and cannot explain what back should restore. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go map transition increment in transactional Pokemon page navigator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-…
objectives: Compute candidate navigation, fetch and validate it, then commit state only after success.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
